welcome_title: Welcome to the Wisconsin Card Sorting Test
welcome_p1: This test measures your cognitive flexibility and ability to adapt to changing rules. It assesses executive functions related to the prefrontal cortex.
welcome_p2: You will be shown cards with colored shapes. Your task is to sort each card by clicking one of the four reference cards at the top. The sorting rule is hidden — you must figure it out from the feedback you receive.
welcome_p3: The sorting rule will change periodically. When it does, you must figure out the new rule based on feedback.
tutorial_step1_text: Four reference cards are displayed at the top of the screen. Each card has a unique combination of shape, color, and number of symbols.
tutorial_step2_text: A stimulus card appears below. Click the reference card that matches it according to the current sorting rule. The rule can be based on color, shape, or number of symbols.
tutorial_step3_text: After each choice, you will see whether your answer was correct or incorrect. Use this feedback to figure out the current sorting rule.
tutorial_step4_text: The sorting rule changes after a series of correct answers. When the rule changes, your previously correct strategy will start producing errors. Adapt as quickly as possible.
demo_intro: Watch how the test works with the current rule being 'color'.
demo_step1: A stimulus card appears below. You need to match it to one of the reference cards above.
demo_step2: Correct! The blue card was sorted to the blue reference card (matching by color).
demo_step3: Now suppose the rule is still 'color'. Here is a new card to sort.
demo_step4: Incorrect! That was the wrong reference card. The feedback tells you to try a different approach.
demo_step5: Here is another card. This time, try to sort by color again.
demo_step6: Correct! Red card sorted to the red reference card. You're getting the hang of it!
demo_step7: You understand how it works. Ready to practice?
practice_complete_text1: Well done! You have completed the practice round.
practice_complete_text2: In the real test, the rules will change more often. Try to adapt as quickly as possible when your answers start being marked wrong.
countdown_instruction: Sort the cards by clicking the matching reference card
bottom_instruction: Click the reference card that matches the stimulus card according to the current rule
settings_trials_per_category_desc: Number of consecutive correct answers needed before the rule changes
settings_total_categories_desc: Number of rule changes before the test ends
settings_max_trials_desc: Maximum number of trials before the test ends regardless of categories completed
settings_response_window_desc: Maximum time allowed to make a selection
settings_feedback_duration_desc: How long correct/incorrect feedback is shown
footer_description: A test of cognitive flexibility — sort cards by changing rules.
